false_positives.where: include/MatrixMarketLoader.h vs src/MatrixMarketLoader.cpp; include/DistributedOps.h vs src/DistributedOps.cpp
false_positives.what_happened: Header/impl declaration-definition overlap: the .h declares (and partly inline-defines) functions whose signatures and template bodies reappear in the .cpp. The cross-file similarity is decl<->def, not copied logic.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: when a cross-file pair is a .h vs its same-stem .cpp, treat as header-impl and require similarity beyond shared signatures (exclude declaration text).

note: Header<->impl decl/def overlap. No copypaste. sccs=0.
